hero.title: Build faster websites with JSON content - 2026
hero.description: This website uses Next.js and JSON files as the main content source.

workflow.title: Content to production in minutes
workflow.subtitle: Edit in Strapi, export to JSON, deploy to Vercel — no rebuilds needed.

steps.title: Edit in Strapi
steps.description: Use the Strapi admin panel to create and update content in any language.

steps.title: Export to JSON
steps.description: Run one command to pull all content into local JSON files, versioned with Git.

steps.title: Deploy to Vercel
steps.description: Push to GitHub and Vercel automatically rebuilds and publishes the site.

items.title: Website development
items.description: We build fast, modern, and scalable websites.

items.title: Content management
items.description: We organize website content using structured JSON files.

items.title: Localization
items.description: We prepare translated content for multilingual websites.

cta.title: Ready to build something great?
